SPICaMusic Settings Play All First Fragment Second Fragment Next Previous Quick Action
Play Action Swipe down to go back to details Now Playing Playlist Select All Select None Flat Custom Bass Boost Bass Reducer Vocal Boost Vocal Reducer ReplayGain Track Gain Album Gain Off Frequency Response Mode Preamp Equalizer Preset Frequency Response Curve Key Words… Add Delete add to playlist info
SPICaMusic Permissions Usage Statement
Welcome to SPICaMusic! To provide you with a complete music experience, we need you to grant the following permissions:
Required Permissions Explained
1. Storage Space/Media File Access Permission (Required)
Purpose: This permission is used to scan local audio files on your device to discover and add them to your music library, allowing you to play your favorite songs at any time.
Our Commitment: SPICaMusic will only access audio files on your device (such as MP3, FLAC, WAV, etc.). We will not access, modify, or upload your private photos, videos, documents, or other non-music files.
2. Notification Permission (Recommended)
Purpose: When you play music in the background, we need this permission to show you a persistent notification. This notification not only allows you to quickly view the currently playing song information but also provides convenient playback controls (such as play/pause, previous/next track).
Your Choice: If you do not grant this permission, background playback control may be limited or may not be displayed in the notification bar.
3. Network Access Permission (Required)
Purpose: To enrich your listening experience, SPICaMusic uses a network connection to fetch lyric information for songs and display them synchronously during playback.
Our Commitment: We only use the network when you need to fetch lyrics and will not engage in unnecessary background network activity or upload your personal data.
Privacy Protection Commitment
SPICaMusic respects and protects your personal privacy. We solemnly promise:
We will only use the permissions you grant within the scope of the functions declared above.
We will not collect, store, or share any sensitive information related to your personal identity.
We will not use your personal data for any commercial advertising or third-party sharing.
You can manage these permissions at any time in the system settings. If you have any questions about our permission usage or privacy policy, please contact us via [Your contact method, e.g., the "About" page in the app or a feedback email].
Thank you for your understanding and support! We hope SPICaMusic brings you an enjoyable music experience.

No favorites match your search. %d songs in total Found %d songs Playlist Overview Create a playlist in the library and it will appear here. Save as Playlist Search Quick Access

Let SPICa discover your music Only audio files on your device are read to build your local library. Ready to organize your music universe Scans MediaStore and extra folders, auto-syncing new, updated, and removed songs. Scan did not complete An unknown error occurred during the scan. Please try again. Media permission denied. Please enable it in system settings. Go to System Settings Grant Media Permission Audio Files Extra Folders Start Smart Scan Rescan Done Later Current File Waiting for next audio file…

Search songs in playlist Search songs, artists, or albums Close search Exit multi-select %d songs selected Rename Playlist Select songs from library to add to playlist %d songs selected Will add %d songs Select songs Add %d songs Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.

No lyrics Seek to this line
Playlist Name My Playlist Give the playlist a name Please enter a playlist name Try these names Create Playlist My Favorites Commute Workout Late Night Radio Study Focus
Discover Music Library
About Version, open-source notices, and privacy About A modern local music player built with Jetpack Compose & Media3 Version %1$s Introduction SPICa Music is a modern Android music player built on Media3 ExoPlayer, Jetpack Compose, and Koin. It plays your local audio in a wide range of high-quality formats (FLAC, ALAC, Opus, and more) and offers lyrics, an equalizer, spectrum visualization, playlists, and listening stats. Everything runs locally on your device — no account required. More Open-source licenses Third-party libraries used in this app App license Released under the MIT License Privacy policy How this app handles your data Project homepage View the source code on GitHub Could not open the link
Open-source licenses This app is made possible by the following open-source projects. Thanks to all their authors and contributors. %1$d libraries
App license
Privacy policy Last updated: %1$s June 2026 SPICa Music respects your privacy. This app is designed to work entirely on your device. This policy explains what data the app accesses and how it is used. Data we access • Audio files and media metadata on your device, used solely to scan and play your music library locally.\n• Playback history, favorites, playlists, and settings, stored only in the app’s local database and preferences on your device.\nThe app does not require an account and does not collect personal identifiers. Network usage The app accesses the network only when you actively search for lyrics online. The song title and artist you search for are sent to the lyrics provider to return matching results. No other data is transmitted. If you never search for lyrics, the app does not send your data over the network. Data storage & retention All app data (library index, playlists, favorites, history, and settings) is stored locally on your device. Uninstalling the app removes this data. The app does not upload your data to any server. Permissions • Media/Audio access: to scan and play local music.\n• Notifications & foreground service: to show playback controls and keep music playing in the background.\n• Network: only for online lyrics search.\n• Vibration & wake lock: for playback-related feedback and stability. Third-party services Online lyrics are retrieved from a third-party lyrics provider only when you search. Please refer to that provider’s own terms for how it handles requests. The app integrates open-source libraries listed under Open-source licenses; they run on-device and do not collect your data through this app. Contact If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please open an issue on the project’s GitHub repository.
